mapper.select: SELECT o.*, pb.serial_number as powerBankSerialNumber, s.name as stationName FROM orders o LEFT JOIN powerbanks pb ON o.powerbank_id = pb.id LEFT JOIN stations s ON o.station_id = s.id WHERE o.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (user_id, powerbank_id, station_id, rent_time, return_time, amount, status, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{powerbankId}, #{stationId}, #{rentTime}, #{returnTime}, #{amount}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
